product.name: Chicken Adobo
product.description: Classic Filipino braised chicken in soy sauce, vinegar, and garlic

product.name: Pork Sinigang
product.description: Savory sour soup with pork ribs and fresh vegetables

product.name: Beef Caldereta
product.description: Rich tomato-based beef stew with potatoes and bell peppers

product.name: Lumpiang Shanghai
product.description: Crispy fried spring rolls filled with seasoned ground pork

product.name: Pancit Canton
product.description: Stir-fried egg noodles with vegetables and meat

product.name: Kare-Kare
product.description: Oxtail and tripe stew in rich peanut sauce

product.name: Halo-Halo
product.description: Shaved ice dessert with mixed sweet beans, fruits, and leche flan

product.name: Lechon Kawali
product.description: Crispy deep-fried pork belly served with liver sauce
